summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trading Terminal Phase 5.1 implementation. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% pass rate). Frontend fully functional with live data integration, SIMULATION badge, symbol switching, and all required UI components.
passed_tests: Terminal health endpoint (/api/terminal/health) - shows live_enabled, rest_enabled, ws_enabled status
Microstructure live endpoint (/api/terminal/micro/live/{symbol}) - returns data with source field (mock)
Decision endpoint (/api/terminal/decision/{symbol}) - returns decision with source and live fields
Positions endpoint (/api/terminal/positions) - returns mock positions for BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT
Terminal authentication endpoint - validates passwords correctly
SIMULATION badge displays correctly when using mock data
Data source indicator shows 'mock' in sidebar
Symbol selector changes data correctly (BTC/ETH/SOL tested)
Decision block updates with symbol changes
Microstructure block shows imbalance, spread, liquidity, state
Positions block displays mock positions with PnL
Execution block shows proper trade parameters
All data-testid attributes present for testing
